listings.name: Shell — 12000 S Shore Blvd, Wellington, FL
listings.website_description: Flagship Shell station in one of Palm Beach County's most affluent communities — anchored by Publix, across from 420+ luxury condos, and surrounded by $124K+ average household incomes. Zoning restrictions prevent any future gas station competition. Includes a high-volume car wash with new equipment, USPS Post Office on-site, beer cave, café, and walk-in coolers. Environmental clean — Phase I passed, no monitoring required.
listings.meta_title: Shell Gas Station for Sale — Wellington, FL | $12.5M | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: Flagship Shell station in Wellington, FL. $12.5M asking, 8.80% cap rate, $1.1M NOI, 76K+ gallons/month. Car wash, USPS, beer cave. No competition zoning.

listings.name: South Florida 11-Site Portfolio
listings.brand: Multi-Brand (Exxon, Shell, BP, Chevron, Mobil, Sunoco)
listings.website_description: Institutional-scale portfolio of 11 branded gas stations with convenience stores across South Florida's highest-traffic corridors. Six major fuel brands represented. 2025 net profit of $13.7M across 13.2M gallons and $19.7M total income. Private sale of active businesses.
listings.meta_title: 11-Site Gas Station Portfolio — South Florida | Off-Market | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: Exclusive off-market portfolio of 11 branded gas stations in South Florida. $19.7M total income, $13.7M net profit, 13.2M gallons. NDA required.

listings.name: St. Petersburg, FL — 3-Site Gas Station Portfolio
listings.website_description: Three geographically clustered gas stations in the Tampa Bay MSA (3.2M population) — all on hard corner signalized intersections with open fuel contracts. Negotiate your own brand, set your own margins. Each site is $2M individually or $6M for the portfolio. Combined 210K+ gallons/month, $260K+ monthly inside sales. All fee simple, owner-user opportunities with 100% bonus depreciation.
listings.meta_title: 3-Site Gas Station Portfolio — St. Petersburg, FL | $6M | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: 3-site gas station portfolio in Tampa Bay MSA. $6M portfolio or $2M/site. 210K+ gallons/month, $260K+ inside sales. Open fuel contracts, hard corners.

listings.name: 2-Station Portfolio — Miami, FL
listings.website_description: Two gas station properties in the heart of Miami-Dade County offered as a portfolio sale. No fuel supply agreement — buyer has full flexibility to rebrand, re-lease, or owner-operate from day one. Existing tenant vacating upon sale. Fully built-out with canopies, tanks, and c-stores.
listings.meta_title: 2-Station Gas Station Portfolio — Miami, FL | Off-Market | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: Off-market 2-site gas station portfolio in Miami-Dade County. $11.5M asking, no fuel contract, fee simple. Immediate availability. NDA required.

listings.name: Texaco — 2202 E Bearss Ave, Tampa, FL
listings.website_description: Newly renovated Texaco with commercial kitchen (13-ft hood), beer cave, and upgraded equipment — positioned on a 44,600 AADT commuter artery connecting North Tampa to I-275. Pad site to a grocery-anchored center near USF (50,000+ students), Walmart Supercenter, and Target. Includes a U-Haul dealership for diversified income. No Lottery or EBT yet — significant value-add opportunity. Real estate and business sale, fee simple.
listings.meta_title: Texaco Gas Station for Sale — Tampa, FL | $2.8M | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: Renovated Texaco in Tampa, FL. $2.8M, 65K gal/month, 44,600 AADT near USF. Commercial kitchen, beer cave, U-Haul income. Value-add opportunity.

listings.name: C-Store & Gas — Port St. Lucie, FL
listings.website_description: Established neighborhood convenience store and gas station on the Treasure Coast with nearly $3M in annual merchandise sales and consistent fuel volume. Asset sale with long-term NNN lease in place. Proven operating history with strong gross profit margins.
listings.meta_title: C-Store & Gas Station — Port St. Lucie, FL | Off-Market | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: Off-market c-store and gas station in Port St. Lucie, FL. $1.9M asking, $550K EBITDA, $6.2M gross sales. NNN lease, Treasure Coast. NDA required.

listings.name: Chevron — 2141 Crystal Grove Dr, Lakeland, FL
listings.website_description: Oversized Chevron station with brand-new 2025 imaging and digital pricing on canopy, Krispy Krunchy Chicken QSR operating inside, and a recently remodeled 5,000+ SF c-store with commercial kitchen and walk-in coolers. Located on the I-4 Corridor between Tampa and Orlando, surrounded by office and industrial parks with heavy commuter traffic. Featured on ABC Local News as a favorite among locals. Environmental compliant, no monitoring. Eight years remaining on fuel supply at Rack +1 with rebate.
listings.meta_title: Chevron Gas Station for Sale — Lakeland, FL | Under Contract | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: Chevron in Lakeland, FL — under contract at $1.99M. 6,400 SF, Krispy Krunchy QSR, new 2025 imaging. I-4 Corridor, 55K gal/month.

listings.name: Travel Center — Booneville, MS
listings.website_description: High-volume Exxon travel center on a major interstate corridor in Northeast Mississippi. Built in 2023 on nearly 17 acres with 12 fueling positions including 5 diesel lanes. On-site QSR, beer cave, showers, and room for additional revenue streams.
listings.meta_title: Exxon Travel Center — Booneville, MS | Off-Market | STAX Real Estate
listings.meta_description: Off-market Exxon travel center in Booneville, MS. $13M asking, $1.38M net income, 17 acres, built 2023. 12 fueling positions, I-22 corridor. NDA required.
